explanation: The user's instruction is to take the currently held object (mug_1) to the coffee machine and turn it on. The robot is already holding mug_1. First, it must go to the coffee machine. Then, it places the mug on the coffee machine. Finally, it turns the coffee machine on. This sequence follows the logical flow of the task and respects the robot's constraints (e.g., only one object can be held at a time, and placement requires holding the object).
